titleStmt.title: SII 34.333: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 333. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the entrance, right side, to the first prākāra of the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Gift of a sum of 160 kāsu by a Pāṟkuḍaiyāṉ for the celebration of festival on new-moon days in the Tirupperumāṉāṇḍār temple in Vaḍa-kōṉāḍu in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍa-chōḻavaḷanāḍu. The temple trustees and the ūrār received the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulO
ttuṅka cōḻa tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 va
tu Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa cōḻa vaḷanā
ṭṭu Uṟattūr kūṟṟattu vaṭakō nāṭ
ṭu Uṭaiyār tirupperumānāṇṭā
kōyilil cīkāriyañ ceyvārun śrīmāyēcura
kaṇkāṇi ceyvāṟrum tēvakanmikō
yiṟ kaṇakkaṉum pāṟkuṭi Ūrōmum
Ivvāṭṭai Innāṭṭu Ikkūṟṟattup pāṟ
kuṭaiyān Avaiyampukkān tēvanukku
nāṅkaḷ Upaiyam paṇṇikkuṭutta pa
ricāvatu Innāyanār kōyil Amāvāsit ti
runāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukaikkupayamāka taiymā
samutal Oṭukkiṉa kācu 100 6 10 Ikkācu nūṟṟa
ṟupatum paṇṭārattē Oṭukku vit
tukkoṇṭu māsam tōṟum Eḻun
taruḷivikkumiṭattu Amutupaṭi Arici
caṭṭiccōṟṟukku Arici 4 m
Āka Aricippatakkum tiruviḷakkeṇṇai
yum vēṇṭum viñcaṉaṅkaḷum
Uṭalliṭṭu cantirātitta Eḻun
taruḷivikkak kaṭavōmāka Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkā
cu śrīpaṇṭārattē Oṭukkukoṇṭu
vaikkak kaṭavōmāka cammatittu Upaiya
m paṇṇikkuṭuttōm Avaiyaṉ pukkān tē
Digital edition of SII 34.333 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
